nextOne.title: Next One
nextOne.cardContent: Web app where users can save their favourite public transport routes to quickly see where the next bus or streetcar is.

communitools.title: Communitools
communitools.cardContent: A platform where users can signup, list tools they own and are willing to lend, and see what their neighbours have to offer. It uses a self reported location to determine which neighbours are nearby.
modalContent: Inspired by borrowing infrequently used tools from my neighbours, I developed a platform where users can together create a neighbourhood tool library. Depending on what a constitutes 'nearby' to a user, they will see all of the tools their neighbours are willing to lend out.
Built with: Rails, PostgreSQL, Devise, Leaflet, Tailwind, and Railway

whereAreWe.title: Where Are We?
whereAreWe.cardContent: Web-based map game where you have to guess the city/location from topological features like roads, rivers, shorelines, releif, etc. Currently in ideation.

allRelated.title: All Related
allRelated.cardContent: Interactive photo album to display my wildlife photography and allow users to see how different species are more or less related to each other. Currently in ideation.

weddingWebsite.title: Custom Wedding Website
weddingWebsite.cardContent: Tailor-made wedding website for a couple who did not like any of the popular website products currently available. Built from scratch to match the clients specific needs.
modalContent: The couple needed features not offered by any of the popular wedding website services. We setup a Rails application without ActiveRecord and used a Google spreadsheet owned and managed by the client as a database. Additionally, internationalization was required since one of the spouse's family does not speak english.
Built with: Rails, Google Drive gem, Tailwind

personalWebsite.title: Personal Website
personalWebsite.cardContent: Website to showcase my work. Also an ongoing project I will use to improve my UI/UX design and try out different CSS frameworks.
modalContent: This website! It serves to showcase my past, current, and future projects.
Built with: Github Pages, and Bulma
